# Lore

History, legends, prophecies, cultural practices, magic systems, custom rules, and anything else that's true about the world but isn't a person, place, thing, or group.

This is the catch-all for worldbuilding content. If it doesn't fit elsewhere, it's lore.

## Schema
- type: lore
- name, category: history | legend | prophecy | culture | magic | religion | custom
- related_locations: list of wiki-links
- related_characters: list of wiki-links
- tags: freeform list

## Contents
(empty — world not yet created)
